## Checklist

- [ ] `workflow.json` is valid JSON with a `nodes` array
- [ ] `manifest.yaml` is included and passes schema validation
- [ ] `README.md` is included with Required integrations and Safety sections
- [ ] `sample-input.json` is included with realistic demo data
- [ ] `sample-output.md` is included with example output
- [ ] `.env.example` is included with all required variables
- [ ] No real API keys, credentials, webhook URLs, or private data committed
- [ ] Human approval is required for any workflow sending external messages
- [ ] Workflow passes `npm run validate` locally without errors
